title: PageSsence - The Book Review Platform
description: PageSsence is a community-driven book review platform I created to help people discover, share, and connect through books. It allows users to browse a wide range of titles, read real opinions from other readers, leave thoughtful reviews, and rate books with a simple star system.
descriptionContinued: My goal was to make reading more interactive and meaningful by building a space where book lovers can express their perspectives and find inspiration in others'.
bookBrowsingSearchDesc: Users can explore a curated collection of books and search titles using keyword-based filtering.
interactiveReviewsRatingsDesc: Logged-in users can leave detailed reviews and rate books with a 5-star system, all managed through a dynamic modal interface.
roleBasedAccessControlDesc: Admin users can add, edit, or delete books, while regular users can only leave reviews and view content.
modernStackUIDesc: Built with Laravel, Vue.js, Inertia.js, and styled using PrimeVue components for a clean, responsive, and intuitive interface.
